old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-c76o","title":"Authenticate before SCHC destination inspection","description":"RplStack::wire_is_for_local decompresses an untrusted SCHC payload before LinkLayer::receive_frame verifies the signed frame. This permits forged signed-bit traffic to exercise SCHC decompression pre-authentication. Simply calling receive_frame first is unsafe because it would commit replay state for valid overheard frames. Add a verify-without-replay-commit path (or equivalent two-phase authenticated destination filtering), then commit replay state only for accepted local traffic. Discovered during frozen convergence reconciliation review; implementation is outside the fixed commit ledger and must be deferred from project-LICHEN-7fqg.2.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T01:54:34.045139164Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T01:54:34.045139164Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-c76o","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T01:54:34.12618783Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
